Stars.Requirements: |@Any jump|
Stars.Comment: Any jump with ledgegrab easily climbs the path and crates. No gaps in the floor.

Stars.Requirements: (|@DJLG height| OR |@WKLG|) AND |@Decently far jump|
Stars.Comment: Climb the crates, then the roof, then a decently far jump to the star platform

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|@Forward jump| OR |!obscure|)
Stars.Comment: Forward jump to climb the intended path, or any jump and wallkick for the arch and stargrab

Stars.Requirements: |@WK|
Stars.Comment: Wallkick to the warp, any jump to grab the star (wallkick requires any jump)

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| OR (|!reasonable| AND (|@Steepjump Dive| OR |@Jumpkick|)) OR (|!obscure| AND |Sideflip|)
Stars.Comment: Any jump and wallkick to press the switch, or shenanigans to jump onto the island directly

Stars.Requirements: |@DJ| OR (|@WK| AND (|@WKLG| OR |Sideflip|))
Stars.Comment: Make it up to the vine in the upper left room, rest is easier

Stars.Requirements: |@DJ| OR |Sideflip| OR (|!reasonable| AND (|Jump| OR |Long Jump|) AND (|Backflip| OR |@WK|))
Stars.Comment: Forward sideflip is free in 2D, and intended+explained in SR3.5 VC. Else Jump/LJ for speed, BF/WK for height.

Stars.Requirements: (|@GP near wall| OR |!reasonable|) AND |@Any jump|
Stars.Comment: Blues aren't exactly needed but you're very likely to come across them while searching for enough coins

Stars.Requirements: (|@Forward jump| OR |Dive|) AND |@WK|
Stars.Comment: Clear the gap, then WK to the star and grab it with any jump

Stars.Requirements: (|@Decently far jump| OR |@DJ| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@Forward move|) OR |@Forward BFWK|) AND (|Jump| OR |@JGP height|)
Stars.Comment: Clear the gap, then jump into the star. There's even a retry warp.

Stars.Requirements: (|@Decently far jump| AND |@JGP height|) OR (|!reasonable| AND |Sideflip| AND |Dive|) OR (|!reasonable| AND |@TJ| AND |Jump|) OR (|!reasonable| AND |Jump| AND |Kick|)
Stars.Comment: Intended path. If you have Jump+Kick, grab the star by climbing the slope.

Stars.Requirements: (|@Forward jump| OR (|!hard| AND |Backflip|)) AND (|@JGP height| OR |@WK|)
Stars.Comment: Crouchquickturn on the edge of the dominoes to clear the gaps with backflips.

Stars.Requirements: |Jump| AND |@DJLG height| AND |@JK height| AND (|Dive| OR |@TJ| OR |!reasonable|)
Stars.Comment: Steepjump.

Stars.Requirements: (|Jump| AND (|@DJLG height| OR |@WKLG|)) OR (|Long Jump| AND |Wallkick|)
Stars.Comment: average red coin star logic

Stars.Requirements: |@TJ| OR |@Steepjump Dive|
Stars.Comment: Jump is enough for everything else in the star

Stars.Requirements: (|@GP| OR |!reasonable|) AND (|Jump| OR |@DJ| OR |Long Jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Sideflip| AND |@GP|))
Stars.Comment: You won't get all 8 blues but that's fine.

Stars.Requirements: |@Any jump| AND |Shell|
Stars.Comment: Shelljumps don't require Jump

Stars.Requirements: ((|Sideflip| OR |@TJ|) AND |@Decently far jump|) OR (|!reasonable| AND (|Jump| OR |Long Jump|)) OR (|!obscure| AND |Sideflip| AND |Dive|)
Stars.Comment: Intended: Get onto the pillar, then jump over the wall. Reasonable/obscure: From the ground next to the pillar, jump over the wall

Stars.Requirements: (|Jump| OR |Long Jump| OR |@DJ| OR (|!obscure| AND |Sideflip|)) AND (|@Decently far jump| OR |@Rollout| OR |!obscure|)
Stars.Comment: Switch timer with Sideflip isn't obvious. Rollout or obscure gets caught on the slope and boosted over to the star island.

Stars.Requirements: |Stars:2|
Stars.Comment: Swim

Stars.Requirements: |Stars:2|
Stars.Comment: Swim

Stars.Requirements: |@Decently far jump| AND |@WK| AND (|@TJ| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@DJLG height|))
(|Shell| OR |!reasonable|) AND |@DJLG height| AND |@WK| AND (|Long Jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@Decently far jump|) OR (|!obscure| AND |@TJ|))
Stars.Comment: you can TJWK from the ground to press the switch

Stars.Requirements: |@Any jump| OR (|!obscure| AND (|Punch| OR |@Buffered Kick| OR |@Rollout|))
Stars.Comment: Swim, then enter the pipe at the lighthouse. Or use "obscure" swimming jumps to farm skeeters, and normal attacks to farm goombas.

Stars.Requirements: |Stars:2|
Stars.Comment: Swim

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND |@Any jump|
Stars.Comment: Jump is only required for the star grab

Stars.Requirements: |Jump| OR |@DJ| OR |Long Jump| OR (|!hard| AND |Sideflip|) AND |@Flyguy self-defense|
Stars.Comment: Flyguy hell, especially when you only have Sideflip. Panels bug out when you enter a cave iirc

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND |Long Jump| AND |@DJLG height|
Stars.Comment: Pretty advanced star path when you think about it

Stars.Requirements: ((|@Decently far jump| OR |@DJ| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@Forward jump|)) AND (|@BF height| OR |@WK|)) OR (|!obscure| AND |Jump| AND (|Long Jump| OR |@TJ| OR |Kick|))
Stars.Comment: Intended: Clear the floor gaps on the entrance, then grab the metal cap. Obscure: Slopejump shenanigans from the pipe exit

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|@Decently far jump| OR |@DJ| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Sideflip|) OR (|!obscure| AND |Jump|))
Stars.Comment: The singlejump off the single chorus fruit block is kind of advanced

Stars.Requirements: |@Forward jump| AND (|@DJLG height| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Long Jump| AND |@WK|))
Stars.Comment: Intended path.

Stars.Requirements: |@Pokeys| AND (|@Forward jump| OR |!obscure|)
Stars.Comment: Good news for anyone on "obscure", breakdances are no longer in logic without punch

Stars.Requirements: |@Forward jump|
Stars.Comment: Intended path.

Stars.Requirements: |@C5 cliff area|
Stars.Comment: Many routes for this one. Stargrab is free

Stars.Requirements: |@C5 town area|
Stars.Comment: If you can get here, you can get the star

Stars.Requirements: (|@C5 back area| AND |@Precision jump|) OR (|!reasonable| AND |!NBGs| AND |@C5 town area|)
Stars.Comment: Longest logic in the game I think. Even Backflip can do the enemy NBG.

Stars.Requirements: |@C5 back area| AND |@Precision jump| AND |@Flyguy self-defense|
Stars.Comment: Backflip wallkick with no flyguy defense might be a tier 3, but I didn't prove it with states

Stars.Requirements: |@Forward jump| AND |@WK|
Stars.Comment: Need wallkick for too many reds, and wallkick makes it easy

Stars.Requirements: |@C5 cliff area|
Stars.Comment: Many routes for this one. Stargrab is free

Stars.Requirements: |@C5 town area| AND |@Boos|
Stars.Comment: Good news for anyone on "hard", breakdances are no longer in logic without punch

Stars.Requirements: (|@Forward move| AND |@Jump height| AND (|@DJ| OR |@BF height| OR |!reasonable|)) OR (|!obscure| AND |Long Jump|)
Stars.Comment: The longjumps from the merlons are kinda precise, but there's not much of a risk to them

Stars.Requirements: |@Decently far jump| AND (|@WK| OR (|!NBGs| AND |Sideflip| AND |Dive|))
Stars.Comment: Swim (and jump)

Stars.Requirements: |@Jump height| AND (|Jump| OR |@Buffered Kick| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Sideflip|) OR (|!Framewalk| AND |Long Jump|) OR (|!hard| AND |!Framewalk|) OR (|!hard| AND |Long Jump| AND |Backflip|))
Stars.Comment: The slope.

Stars.Requirements: |@C6 spawn| AND |@Any jump|
Stars.Comment: Any jump to grab the cap box. Cannon shots and wing cap are free.

Stars.Requirements: |@C6 cliff area| AND (|Long Jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@DJ| AND (|Kick| OR |Dive|))) AND (|@Jump height| OR |@WK| OR |!obscure|)
Stars.Comment: Last jump is kinda far. If you only have Longjump, think before you get rid of goombas.

Stars.Requirements: |@Forward jump| AND (|@DJLG height| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@WK|)) AND (|@WK| AND (|@BFGP height| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@DJ|)) OR (|!obscure| AND |@C6 cliff area|)) AND (|Dive| OR |!Forgo self-defense| OR |!hard|)
Stars.Comment: Only one way to get rid of these flyguys: Dive.

Stars.Requirements: |@C6 cliff area| AND |Wallkick| AND (|Jump| OR |@DJ| OR |Sideflip| OR (|!obscure| AND |Backflip|))
Stars.Comment: Yeah.

Stars.Requirements: |@C6 cliff area| AND ((|@Jump height| AND |@Forward move|) OR (|!obscure| AND |Long Jump|))
Stars.Comment: Did you know that a longjump easily makes it from the sand pipe to the cliff area? Only have to know the angle and when to hit A

Stars.Requirements: |@C7 plateau| AND |@Precision jump| AND |@WK|
Stars.Comment: Easy ending

Stars.Requirements: |@C7 plateau| AND |@Precision jump| AND |@Decently far jump| AND |@WK|
Stars.Comment: Slightly more involved ending

Stars.Requirements: (|@Decently far jump| OR |@TJ| OR |!reasonable|) AND |@Jump height| AND |@Forward jump|
Stars.Comment: Reasonable: 2 lavabounces get to the start of the path

Stars.Requirements: (|@Decently far jump| OR |@TJ| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@DJ|)) AND (|Long Jump| OR |@DJ| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@WK|))
Stars.Comment: Climb the bridge, then the chorus fruits

Stars.Requirements: |@C7 shell|
Stars.Comment: Damageboost probably intended, just gotta grab the box

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND |@DJ| AND (|Kick| OR |Long Jump|)
Stars.Comment: yes you obviously need wk for that, my bad

Stars.Requirements: |@DJ| AND (|Long Jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Kick|)) AND (|@WK| OR |@BF height| OR |!reasonable|)
Stars.Comment: had to decide on a balance there

Stars.Requirements: |@Forward jump| AND |@Spindrift| AND (|@C7 shell| OR |@C7 plateau|)
Stars.Comment: Would you look at that, another coin star with an "or obscure" macro. You just love fighting enemies with breakdances don't you

Stars.Requirements: (|@JK height| OR |@GP near wall|) AND (|@Forward move| OR |@Rollout| OR |!reasonable|)
Stars.Comment: Grab the cap. You can just run straight onto the first cube.

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND ((|Jump| AND (|@TJ| OR |Kick|)) OR |!reasonable|) AND (|Long Jump| OR |@TJ| OR |Sideflip| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@DJ|))
Stars.Comment: Intended path.

Stars.Requirements: (|Jump| OR |Long Jump| OR (|!hard| AND |Backflip| AND |@Forward move|)) AND (|@Decently far jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@DJ|) OR |!obscure|) AND (|@DJLG height| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@WK|) OR |!obscure|)
Stars.Comment: Obscure: Memorize 2 cannon shots. Hard: Clear the bully, 5 backflips, 2 bounces, then either dive through the heart or make it to the house in 2+1 bounces

Stars.Requirements: (|@Forward jump| OR |@Forward BFWK|) AND |@WK| AND (|Jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Long Jump| AND |Sideflip|) OR (|!NBGs| AND |Dive| AND |Sideflip|) OR |!obscure|)
Stars.Comment: Obscure: Two 45° wallkicks to the last box.

Stars.Requirements: |@Forward jump| AND |@WK| AND |Shell| AND (|@TJ| OR (|!reasonable| AND (|@DJ| OR |Sideflip|)) OR (|!obscure| AND |@BFGP height|))
Stars.Comment: Yeah.

Stars.Requirements: (|@Forward jump| OR |@Forward BFWK|) AND |@WK| AND (|@Decently far jump| OR |!reasonable|)
Stars.Comment: Yes, forward BWFK makes it to the house - then just a BFWK to start the crossover.

Stars.Requirements: (|@Forward jump| OR |@Forward BFWK|) AND (|@Jump height| OR |@GP near wall| OR (|!obscure| AND |Ground Pound|))
Stars.Comment: Mind the cap timer. Obscure: Lavaboost onto the box, then crawl off and GP.

Stars.Requirements: |@Forward jump| AND |@WK| AND (|@JK height| OR |@GP near wall| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Long Jump|))
Stars.Comment: coins

Stars.Requirements: |@Forward jump| AND |@WK| AND (|@Jump height| OR |!reasonable|)
Stars.Comment: Intended path.

Stars.Requirements: |@Forward jump| AND ((|@WK| AND |@DJLG height|) OR (|!reasonable| AND |@TJ| AND (|Dive| OR |!hard|) AND (|Kick| OR |!hard|))) AND |@Flyguy self-defense|
Stars.Comment: The table legs are pretty scuffed.

Stars.Requirements: (|@Forward move| OR |@Forward BFWK|) AND |@WK| AND (|@Forward jump| OR |@BFGP height| OR |!hard|) AND (|@Flyguy self-defense| OR |!reasonable|)
Stars.Comment: Backflip wallkick doesn't reach the star, backflip double wallkick does.

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND ((|Long Jump| AND (|@DJLG height| OR |!reasonable|)) OR (|!obscure| AND |@Decently far jump|)) AND (|@Flyguy self-defense| OR |!reasonable|)
Stars.Comment: You can push the box you know

Stars.Requirements: |@TJ| OR (|!hard| AND (|Jump| OR |Sideflip| OR (|Long Jump| AND |Wallkick|))) AND |@Flyguy self-defense|
Stars.Comment: Twirling is hard

Stars.Requirements: (|@Decently far jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Jump|)) AND ((|Sideflip| AND |@WK| AND |@DJ| AND (|@TJ| OR |!reasonable|)) OR (|!NBGs| AND |Dive| AND |@Forward jump|))
|@Forward move| AND |@Any jump| AND |@WK|
Stars.Comment: You can NBG but it doesn't skip all wallkicks

Stars.Requirements: (|@WK| AND |Long Jump| AND |@GP|) OR (|!reasonable| AND |@Decently far jump| AND |@WK|) OR (|!obscure| AND |@TJ| AND (|Long Jump| OR |Dive| OR |Kick| OR |!hard|)) AND |@Flyguy self-defense|
Stars.Comment: Yeah. Skipping blues can be reasonable

Sign.Comment: Kind of surprising that a dive rollout can reasonably get something in this stage

Stars.Requirements: |@C10 house|
Stars.Comment: Not the only star where you might climb this house

Stars.Requirements: (|@DJ| AND |Sideflip|) OR (|!reasonable| AND |@DJLG height|) OR (|!obscure| AND |@Forward jump| AND |@WK|) AND |@Lakitu self-defense|
Stars.Comment: Intended path.

Stars.Requirements: |@C10 reds area|
Stars.Comment: Obscure: Climb the house and jump from the big flower.

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND ((|@Forward jump| AND |@DJLG height|) OR (|!reasonable| AND |@Forward jump| AND |@Jump height|) OR (|!hard| AND |Backflip|)) AND |@Lakitu self-defense|
Stars.Comment: yeah

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|Long Jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Backflip|) OR |!obscure|) AND (|@DJLG height| OR |!reasonable|) AND (|@Jump height| OR |!obscure|)
Stars.Comment: enter Lumps Jumps

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|Jump| OR |Sideflip|) AND (|@DJLG height| OR |!reasonable|) AND |@Lakitu self-defense|
Stars.Comment: Good luck.

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|Long Jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Backflip|) OR |!obscure|) AND (|@TJ| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@DJ| AND |@GP|) OR (|!hard| AND |@DJ|) OR (|!hard| AND |Sideflip| AND |@GP|))
Stars.Comment: Triplejump so much more satisfying than the alternatives

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|@TJ| OR (|Jump| AND |@GP|) OR |@C10 reds area|) AND |@Lakitu self-defense| AND |@Bob-omb self-defense|
Stars.Comment: Reds or blues

Stars.Requirements: |@Precision jump|
Stars.Comment: Mind the heave-hos.

Stars.Requirements: |@GP| AND |@Forward jump| AND (|Long Jump| OR |!reasonable|) AND (|@DJ| OR |Sideflip| OR |Backflip| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Jump|) OR (|!obscure| AND |Long Jump|))
Stars.Comment: The stairs have slightly unintuitive collision

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|@Forward jump| OR |@Forward BFWK|) AND (|@DJLG height| OR (|!obscure| AND |@Any jump|))
Stars.Comment: Intended path.

Stars.Requirements: (|@WK| OR |!obscure|) AND |Jump| AND (|Kick| OR |!reasonable|)
Stars.Comment: Wallkick from the bumper or strain really far left. Then slopejump if you fall off the panels

Stars.Requirements: |@Forward jump| AND ((|@DJ| AND (|Kick| OR |@GP|)) OR (|!reasonable| AND |Backflip|) OR (|!hard| AND (|@DJ| OR (|Jump| AND |@GP|) OR |Sideflip|))) AND (|Long Jump| OR |!reasonable|) AND (|Backflip| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@DJLG height|))
Stars.Comment: Climbing the shrink platforms with inconvenient moves is a lot harder than it looks

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND |@Forward jump| AND (|@Buffered Kick| OR |@TJ| OR (|!reasonable| AND (|@DJ| OR |@Jumpkick|)) OR |!Framewalk| OR |!obscure|) AND (|Jump| OR |Sideflip| OR |!obscure|) AND (|@DJ| OR |Sideflip| OR |Backflip| OR |Long Jump| OR |@Jumpkick| OR |!obscure|)
Stars.Comment: Good luck on obscure.

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|@Forward jump| OR |@Forward BFWK|) AND ((|@Decently far jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Jump|)) AND (|@Jump height| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Ground Pound|))) OR (|!obscure| AND (|Sideflip| OR |@DJ| OR |Backflip|))
Stars.Comment: Non-obscure actually grabs the cap

Stars.Requirements: |@Precision jump| AND ((|@WK| AND |@GP near wall|) OR (|!reasonable| AND |@GP near wall| AND |Punch|) OR (|!obscure| AND |Punch| AND |@WK|))
Stars.Comment: Get 2 of: Blues, Chuckyas, Star 3+4 paths

Sign.Requirements: |@WK| OR |Sideflip| OR |@DJ| OR |Backflip| OR |Long Jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Jump|)

Stars.Requirements: (|@Precision jump| AND (|Jump| OR |!obscure| OR |!Forgo self-defense|)) OR (|!hard| AND |@Forward BFWK|)
Stars.Comment: The snufits can be annoying if you don't have Jump

Stars.Requirements: (|@C12 spawn| AND |Shell|) OR (|!obscure| AND |Long Jump| AND (|Jump| OR |!Forgo self-defense|)) OR (|!hard| AND (|@Forward jump| OR |@Forward BFWK|))
Stars.Comment: Obscure: Longjump from s1 directly to the star platform. Hard: Angle setup and run onto the pyramid, then slidefall to the star platform

Stars.Requirements: |@C12 spawn| AND |@WK|
Stars.Comment: Wallkick

Stars.Requirements: |@C12 spawn| AND (|@DJLG height| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Jump|) OR |!obscure|) AND (|@Jumpkick| OR |!reasonable|)
Stars.Comment: Obscure: Climb the blues tower

Stars.Requirements: |@C12 spawn| AND |Punch| AND (|@Jump height| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Long Jump| AND |Wallkick|))
Stars.Comment: Punchgrabs go hard

Stars.Requirements: |@Decently far jump| AND (|@TJ| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@Jumpkick| AND (|@DJ| OR (|!obscure| AND |@BF height|))))
Stars.Comment: Slopes

Stars.Requirements: |@C12 spawn| AND (|Shell| OR (|!obscure| AND |@Jumpkick|)) AND |@WK| AND (|Long Jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@JK height|))
Stars.Comment: Yeah

Stars.Requirements: |@C12 spawn| AND |@GP| AND (|Jump| OR |!reasonable|)
Stars.Comment: Blues

Sign.Comment: In front of the quicksand wallkicks

Stars.Requirements: |@Forward jump| AND |@WK| AND (|Long Jump| OR |!reasonable|) AND (|@TJ| OR |Sideflip| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@DJ|))
Stars.Comment: yeah

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|@TJ| OR |!reasonable|) AND (|Long Jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@TJ| AND |Dive|)) AND (|@Jump height| OR |@GP near wall|)
Stars.Comment: Big boy moves

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|Sideflip| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@DJ|) OR (|!obscure| AND |@Forward jump|)) AND (|Long Jump| OR (|!obscure| AND |@Forward jump|))
Stars.Comment: yeah so you can forward jump into a 45° off the cage

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|Long Jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@TJ|)) AND (|@DJLG height| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Jump|) OR |@Forward BFWK|)
Stars.Comment: yeah

Stars.Requirements: |@C13 back area| AND (|@Any jump| OR (|!obscure| AND |Wallkick|))
Stars.Comment: The only Wallkick-only star I found (aside from the pure swimming ones)

Stars.Requirements: |@Forward jump| AND |@WK| AND ((|@DJ| AND |Kick|) OR |!reasonable|) AND (|Long Jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND (|@TJ| OR |Sideflip| OR |@Jumpkick|)) OR (|!obscure| AND |Backflip|)) AND (|@DJLG height| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Jump|))
Stars.Comment: gotta fullclimb

Stars.Requirements: |@C13 back area| AND |@WK| AND (|@Forward jump| OR |@Forward BFWK|) AND |Triple Jump|
Stars.Comment: Rare triple jump opportunity without the DJ item (not that it matters)

Stars.Requirements: |@C13 back area| AND |@Forward jump| AND |@WK| AND ((|@GP| AND (|Long Jump| OR |!reasonable|)) OR (|Long Jump| AND |@DJLG height|) OR (|!reasonable| AND (|Long Jump| OR |@DJLG height|)) OR |!obscure|)
Stars.Comment: average coins logic

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|Long Jump| OR (|!obscure| AND (|Jump| OR |Sideflip|)))
Stars.Comment: Wind is obscure when you're not longjumping

Stars.Requirements: |Jump| OR |@DJ| OR (|!reasonable| AND (|Long Jump| OR |Backflip|)) OR (|!obscure| AND |Sideflip|)
Stars.Comment: Jumpless entry is hard, jumpless stargrab sadly doesn't seem possible. Sideflips benefit from crawling

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|Long Jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@TJ| AND |Dive|) OR (|!obscure| AND |@DJ| AND (|Dive| OR |Kick|))) AND |@Jump height|
Stars.Comment: dark area

Stars.Requirements: |@Any jump| AND |@WK|
Stars.Comment: yup

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|@DJ| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Sideflip|))
Stars.Comment: blocks

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND |@Any jump| AND (|Triple Jump| OR |!reasonable|) AND (|@DJ| OR |Sideflip| OR |Backflip| OR |!reasonable|)
Stars.Comment: yeah so you don't even need the fancy bumper triplejumps

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND ((|Jump| AND |Long Jump|) OR (|!reasonable| AND (|Jump| OR |Long Jump|)) OR (|!hard| AND |@Any jump|))
Stars.Comment: random shortcuts

Stars.Requirements: |@GP near wall| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@Any jump| AND (|Punch| OR |@WK|))
Stars.Comment: Blues or a lot of star paths

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|@DJ| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@Forward jump|) OR |@Forward BFWK|)
Stars.Comment: yeah

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|@Forward jump| OR |@Forward BFWK|) AND (|@DJLG height| OR |!reasonable|)
Stars.Comment: All of c15 is surrounded by 45° quicksand wallkicks btw

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|@Forward jump| OR |@Forward BFWK|)
Stars.Comment: Long way around

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|@Forward jump| OR |@Forward BFWK|) AND (|@DJLG height| OR |!reasonable|)
Stars.Comment: Even longer way around. From the sand block, just walk off

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|@Forward jump| OR |@Forward BFWK|) AND (|Sideflip| OR |!reasonable|)
Stars.Comment: These paths are a lot more interesting than what you see in normal play aren't they

Stars.Requirements: (|@Forward jump| OR |@Forward BFWK|) AND (|@WK| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@DJ|) OR (|!hard| AND |Sideflip| OR |Long Jump|))
Stars.Comment: Yes, we can go wallkickless on this one

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND ((|@TJ| AND |Sideflip|) OR (|!obscure| AND |@Forward jump|))
Stars.Comment: Crossover from the far left side of the level

Stars.Requirements: |@WK| AND (|@Forward jump| OR |@Forward BFWK|) AND (|@Jumpkick| OR |!reasonable|)
Stars.Comment: The kick helps for not missing the star platform

Sign.Requirements: |!obscure| AND |@B1 first half| AND |@B1 second half| AND (|@WK| OR |!hard|)
Sign.Comment: Above the last pole before the fight pipe.

Stars.Requirements: (|@JK height| OR (|!obscure| AND |Long Jump|)) AND (|Punch| OR |Dive|)
Stars.Comment: yeah

Sign.Requirements: (|@JGP height| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Jump| AND |Kick|) OR (|!obscure| AND |Long Jump|))

|!obscure| AND (|@DJLG height| OR |@WKLG|) AND ((|@TJ| AND |Wallkick|) OR (|!NBGs| AND |Dive| AND (|Sideflip| OR |@WK|)) OR (|!hard| AND |Long Jump| AND |@WK| AND (|@DJ| OR |Sideflip| OR |Backflip| OR (|!hard| AND |Jump| AND |Dive|))))
Sign.Comment: TJWK, NBG, or a hard LJWK off the highest brick

Stars.Requirements: |@Any jump| OR |@Rollout|
Stars.Comment: Stargrab

Stars.Requirements: (|Punch| AND |Jump| AND (|@WK| OR |!reasonable|)) OR (|!reasonable| AND |@WK| AND |@Forward jump|)
Stars.Comment: When intended is harder than the cheese

Stars.Requirements: |@Any jump| AND |Key 1|
Stars.Comment: right you need the key

Macros.DJ: |Double Jump| AND (|Jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@Buffered Kick|) OR (|!obscure| AND |Sideflip|))
Macros.WK: |Wallkick| AND (|Jump| OR |@DJ| OR |Long Jump| OR |Sideflip| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Backflip|))
Macros.GP near wall: |Ground Pound| AND (|Jump| OR |@DJ| OR |Sideflip| OR |Backflip| OR |@WK|)
Macros.BFGP height: (|Backflip| AND |Ground Pound|) OR (|Sideflip| AND |Ground Pound|) OR |@TJ|
Macros.Decently far jump: |Long Jump| OR (|Jump| AND |Kick|) OR (|@DJ| AND |Dive|) OR (|!reasonable| AND |Jump| AND |Dive|)
Macros.Pokeys: |Punch| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Dive|) OR |Slidekick| OR |@GP| OR |@Jumpkick| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@BF height|)
Macros.C5 arch path: (|!reasonable| AND (|@Jumpkick| OR (|@DJ| AND (|Long Jump| OR |Dive|)))) OR (|!hard| AND |Sideflip| AND |Dive| AND |Jump|)
Macros.C5 cliff area: |@C5 right path| OR |@C5 pipes path| OR |@C5 arch path|
Macros.C5 back area: |@Jumpkick| OR |Long Jump| OR |@TJ| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Dive| AND (|Jump| OR |Sideflip|)) OR (|!obscure| AND |@C5 town area|)
Macros.C6 cliff area: |@C6 spawn| AND ((|@Forward move| AND |@DJLG height|) OR (|!reasonable| AND (|Backflip| OR |Jump|)) OR (|!reasonable| AND |Long Jump| AND |Wallkick|) OR (|!obscure| AND |Long Jump|)) AND (|@Flyguy self-defense| OR |!reasonable|)
Macros.C7 plateau: |@WK| AND |@Precision jump| AND (|@Decently far jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Sideflip| AND |Dive|) OR |!obscure|)
Macros.Spindrift: |@C7 shell| OR |Punch| OR |@GP| OR |@Buffered Kick| OR |@Jumpkick| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@Any jump|)
Macros.Lakitu self-defense: |@GP| OR |@Jumpkick| OR (|!reasonable| AND (|Jump| OR |Sideflip|)) OR (|!obscure| AND |@Any jump|) OR |!Forgo self-defense| OR |!hard|
Macros.Bob-omb self-defense: |Punch| OR |@Buffered Kick| OR |@Jumpkick| OR (|!reasonable| AND |Jump|) OR |!Forgo self-defense| OR |!obscure|
Macros.C12 spawn: |@Forward jump| AND (|@Decently far jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@DJ|) OR |!obscure|)
Macros.C13 back area: (|Jump| OR |!Forgo self-defense| OR |!obscure|) AND (|@DJ| OR |@BF height| OR |@WKLG| OR (|!obscure| AND (|Jump| OR |Wallkick|)))
Macros.B1 first half: |!BCBCAC| OR ((|@DJLG height| OR |@WK|) AND (|Long Jump| OR (|@DJ| AND |Kick|) OR (|!obscure| AND |@DJ|) OR |@Forward BFWK|) AND (|Dive| OR |!reasonable|))
Macros.B1 second half: (|@Forward jump| OR |@Forward BFWK|) AND (|@Jump height| OR |@WK|) AND (|@DJ| OR |Long Jump| OR |!reasonable|)
Macros.C10 house: |@WK| AND ((|@DJ| AND |@Decently far jump| AND (|Sideflip| OR |Long Jump|)) OR (|!reasonable| AND |@Forward jump|) OR (|!obscure| AND |Backflip|)) AND |@Lakitu self-defense| AND (|Punch| OR |!Forgo self-defense| OR |!reasonable|)
Macros.C10 reds area: |@WK| AND ((|@TJ| AND |@Lakitu self-defense|) OR (|!obscure| AND |@C10 house| AND (|Long Jump| OR (|Jump| AND |Dive|) OR (|!hard| AND |@Any jump| AND |Dive|) OR (|!hard| AND |Jump| AND |Kick|))))

Entrances: |Stars:2| AND (|@Any jump| OR (|!reasonable| AND |@Rollout| AND |!v1.0.1|) OR (|!hard| AND |Dive|))
